title: crataegus crus-galli var. macra
intro: Crataegus crus-galli var. macra is a specific variety of hawthorn plant, which is a deciduous shrub native to Europe, western Asia, and northwestern Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a vasodilator, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, which can help to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of heart disease. The health benefits of Crataegus crus-galli var. macra include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy for individuals with cardiovascular issues. In herbal preparations, Crataegus crus-galli var. macra is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, tinctures, and capsules to support heart health and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease.
